title: FARMERS MARKETS - 211info
text: FARMERS MARKET FUND FARMERS MARKETS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Farmers Markets offer farm fresh locally produced fruits, vegetables, meats, fish, dairy, herbs, flowers, food, and craft items. Markets accept SNAP benefits for food items. Website Portland, OR 97213 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Days and hours vary by market Email (503) 208-4495 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 208-4495 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: -Visit website to find specific market information, walk in to market during specified days and times -SNAP participants: Visit the information booth to receive tokens to purchase from vendors and to receive other information -During times of inclement weather, double check with market site and/or social media to ensure that they will be open FEES: Varies by item DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Farmers Markets Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - COMMUNITY SUPPORTED AGRICULTURE FOOD - DOUBLE UP FOOD BUCKS FOOD - PRODUCE MATCH If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. FARMERS MARKET FUND
